cards.title: Geriatric Assessment
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • CGA (Comprehensive Geriatric Assessment) domains
  • Frailty: Fried criteria (weakness, slowness, exhaustion, weight loss, low activity)
  • Functional status: ADL, IADL scales
  • Cognitive screening: MoCA (score <26 = impairment)

cards.title: Functional Ability & Nutrition
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Sarcopenia: SARC-F questionnaire, handgrip strength
  • Protein needs: 1.2–2.0 g/kg/day in elderly
  • Falls prevention: Vitamin D + Ca + exercise (OTAGO program)
  • Frailty reversal: Resistance training + protein

cards.title: Dementia & Cognitive Decline
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Types: Alzheimer's (60%), Vascular, Lewy body, FTD
  • MMSE: 24–30 Normal, 18–23 Mild, 0–17 Severe
  • Behavioural symptoms: Non-pharmacological first
  • Caregiver support & respite care

cards.title: Continence, Pain & Polypharmacy
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • UI (Urinary Incontinence): PFMT (Kegel) + bladder training
  • Chronic pain: Low-dose naltrexone, topical compounding
  • Beers criteria: PIMs (Potentially Inappropriate Medications)
  • Deprescribing: Brown bag review technique
